Frequently Asked Questions

What is Presgera?

Presgera is a dietary supplement specifically designed to alleviate the discomfort associated with neuropathy. It is based on extensive research and contains a combination of scientifically proven ingredients that target the “Trinity of Nerve Discomfort.” It provides relief from discomfort, promotes nerve function and combats inflammation. The formula includes the key ingredient Magnesium Glycinate, which is known to support a healthy inflammatory response and alleviate mild discomfort.

When will my order arrive?

a: Starting this month, inventory is available, and when you order now, you will immediately receive a confirmation email. Rest assured, we are working hard to get your order to you as quickly as possible!We ship your order directly to your home or office with a premium shipping service, and you will receive it within 7 to 14 business days after placing your order. The products are shipped from Florida, USA, and we will send you a shipping notification with a tracking number once your order is shipped, so you can track it all the way to your doorstep.

What is the refund policy?

a: Your order is protected by our 60-Day Satisfaction Promise from the original purchase date. This guarantee removes all risk and allows you to try Presgera with complete confidence.If you 80%99re not satisfied within 60 days, simply contact support@presgera.com and our team will assist you promptly.

Is it safe to buy online?

a: Online shopping is absolutely one of the safest ways to shop! SSL certificates authenticate our identity and encrypt the information visitors enter on our website. This prevents thieves from "eavesdropping" on any data between our website and another computer. When an SSL certificate is installed, you can be sure that the information you send is secure and cannot be viewed by cybercriminals.Our SSL certificate allows the browser and web server to establish a secure, encrypted connection. The SSL "handshake" process that establishes the secure session occurs discreetly in the background without interrupting your shopping experience. A padlock icon in the browser status bar and the "https://" prefix in the URL are the only visible signs of an ongoing secure session.The Presgera checkout page is secured with a Symantec Class 3 EV SSL Web Server Certificate. Transactions on the website are protected with up to 256-bit Secure Sockets Layer encryption. Encryption means that all transmitted data is scrambled, so it is meaningless to the recipient in case of an error.We use a third-party credit card processor that meets the strictest international data security standards to handle our credit card payments, so no one ever has access to your credit card information. We do NOT store your credit card number in our records.At Presgera Labs, we understand that you are trusting us with your financial security when shopping online. We have done everything possible to ensure that your information is secure from start to finish, and we thank you for your trust in us.

How does Presgera differ from everything I’ve tried so far?

Presgera stands out because of its unique formulation that combines PEA with seven other powerful ingredients, including healing herbs like Corydalis Lutea, Passionflower, Marshmallow Root, and California Poppy Seeds, as well as compounds like Acetylcarnitine (ALCAR), Coenzyme Q10, and Turmeric. This combination not only alleviates discomfort caused by neuropathy but also promotes nerve regeneration and protection while providing additional benefits such as reducing anxiety, improving mood, and supporting sleep.

How does Presgera compare to other similar supplements?

Presgera differs from other similar supplements through its comprehensive approach and strong scientific backing. While many supplements only focus on temporary relief of discomfort, Presgera aims to combat the underlying causes of neuropathy, reduce inflammation, promote nerve regeneration, and improve overall nerve health. The effectiveness of Presgera's ingredients is supported by clinical studies and user reports, which highlight significant improvements in a short amount of time.

Will it work for me?

a: Everyone 80 C2 E2 99t meet your expectations, you 80 80%94 simply contact us within 60 days of your original purchase for assistance.

How do I take it?

Take 1 capsule per day with water, either in the morning or evening. For better absorption, avoid taking it at the same time as other medications — allow at least 30 minutes of separation.

How quickly does it work?

a: You will quickly notice benefits related to mood, sleep, and energy.As for nutrient support and nerve function, this doesn 80 80 C2 E2 99t work for everyone. Which is why we offer a 60-day guarantee on your most recent order.

Are there any side effects?

a: Presgera is made with carefully selected natural ingredients that are recognized for their safety in daily use. There have been no reports of side effects. Presgera is a 100% natural, safe supplement with no side effects.

Can I take Presgera along with my current medications?

a: Yes, you can take Presgera even if you 80 E2 99s a natural supplement. To ensure the best absorption of the ingredients, we recommend taking it about 30 minutes before or after your medications.

How long is the product good for?

a: Each bottle is stamped with a "manufacture date" (DOM). We recommend using the product within 24 months from the DOM.

Will I be enrolled in a subscription or auto-delivery?

a: No, we only offer a one-time purchase to avoid confusion. If you like the product, we trust that you will return on your own.

Where is the product made?

a: We proudly make each component locally in Los Angeles, CA. We do not outsource any of our customer service positions abroad and proudly support the local economy.

What are the total ingredients in our formula designed to relieve neuropathy discomfort?

Inactive Ingredients Overview

Hypromellose (Plant Capsule): This plant-based capsule material ensures fast dissolution for quick release and absorption of active ingredients, and is suitable for vegetarians and health-conscious consumers.
Microcrystalline Cellulose: Serves as an excellent filler and texture agent, helps stabilize the formulation, and ensures uniform dosage in each capsule for consistent delivery and effectiveness.
Magnesium Stearate: Used as a flow agent and improves the manufacturing process by preventing ingredients from sticking to production equipment, ensuring the quality and safety of the capsules.
Stearic Acid: This fatty acid serves both as an emulsifier and lubricant, improving ingredient mixing and contributing to the smooth consistency of the capsules.
Silicon Dioxide: Often used as a separating agent, it prevents ingredients from clumping, ensuring that each dose contains the correct amount of active ingredients.
Note: These ingredients are essential for the overall stability and quality of our formula for neuropathy relief. They do not directly impact treatment but support the effective delivery and reliability of the active components.

How does the guarantee work again?

a: After you place your order for Presgera AE , you have 60 days from the original purchase date to try it for yourself. If you 80 E2 99ll find this contact listed on our website, in your confirmation email, and inside every Presgera AE package.

What if I have more questions?

a: If you have questions during your experience, you can always reach out to our U.S.-based support team at our support email support@presgera.com or by phone at +1 (719) 824-2781. Both our email and phone number are always available on our website.

DR. KENJI SATOH

Dr. Kenji Satoh is a world-renowned doctor specializing in nerve health, neurodegeneration, and traditional Japanese medicine.

Dr. Satoh is recognized worldwide for creating the “Japanese Red Vitamin” — a groundbreaking formula that is not just changing how neuropathy is treated, but reversing severe cases of nerve damage once thought to be permanent.
